cards.title: AI Token Futures Trading Emerges
cards.body: Major exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens, treating them as raw materials like electricity or bandwidth. This shift reflects AI's evolving role in computational markets.

cards.title: Anthropic Releases Opus 4.8 Model
cards.body: The new Opus version introduces Dynamic Workflows, a tool for coordinating swarms of subagents. This enhances multi-agent coordination capabilities.

cards.title: Sesame Launches iOS Conversational AI App
cards.body: The Oculus founders' startup brings its conversational AI agents to iOS, designed to feel like natural conversations rather than traditional chatbots.

cards.title: Apple Redesigns Siri for iOS 27
cards.body: New renders show Apple's planned AI overhaul including a redesigned Siri experience and standalone app. The update aims to compete with ChatGPT.

cards.title: RSI: The New AGI Frontier
cards.body: AI labs are increasingly focused on recursive self-improvement as the next goal. Progress on RSI remains elusive but continues to attract major research efforts.

cards.title: Enterprise AI Enters Safety Phase
cards.body: Companies are shifting from evaluating AI's potential to assessing safe, broad deployment. This marks a new maturity phase in enterprise AI adoption.

cards.title: YouTube Expands Podcast Features
cards.body: The platform adds AI recommendation tools and auto speed features to compete for podcast audiences. This reflects YouTube's broader content strategy shift.

cards.title: Visa Invests in Replit
cards.body: Visa partners with Replit to enable agentic payments for developers. Over 1,000 Visa employees already use Replit for prototyping.

cards.title: SambaNova Positioned as Next Cerebras
cards.body: General Compute sees SambaNova as the breakout AI chipmaker candidate. The hunt for AI compute continues to reshape the hardware landscape.

cards.title: Vertu AI Foldable Targets CEOs
cards.body: The luxury foldable device starts at $6,880 with AI-agent workflows and enterprise integrations. It's built on the open-source Hermes project.

cards.title: Google AI Spelling Accuracy Issues
cards.body: Google's AI models continue to struggle with basic spelling tasks. The recurring issue raises questions about foundational AI capabilities.

cards.title: Snowflake Signs $6B AWS AI Deal
cards.body: Snowflake commits $6 billion over five years for AWS AI CPU chips. The partnership further sidelines Nvidia in enterprise chip procurement.

cards.title: Remote Reaches $300M ARR Milestone
cards.body: The payroll startup achieved 50% revenue-per-employee growth through AI adoption, reaching $300 million ARR while maintaining headcount. The company is now cash-flow positive.

cards.title: Google Search Now AI-First
cards.body: AI-generated answers now dominate Google search results over traditional blue links. Most brands lack visibility into how AI describes them to users.

cards.title: Meta Launches Subscription Strategy
cards.body: Meta rolls out paid subscriptions for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp globally. New AI, creator, and business offerings are part of 'Meta One' initiative.

cards.title: Cognition Raises $1B Funding Round
cards.body: The AI coding startup reaches $25 billion pre-money valuation with $492 million ARR. Cognition more than doubled its valuation in eight months.

cards.title: AI tokens emerge as tradeable commodity futures
cards.body: Large exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens, treating them as raw material inputs like electricity or bandwidth. This marks a shift in how computational outputs are valued in financial markets.

cards.title: Anthropic releases Opus 4.8 with Dynamic Workflows
cards.body: The new model includes a tool for coordinating swarms of subagents. This advancement enables more complex AI agent orchestration.

cards.title: SpaceX Anthropic compute deal remains disputed
cards.body: Elon Musk frames xAI's arrangement with Anthropic as short-term and cancellable. SpaceX's S-1 filing contradicts this, describing payments through May 2029.

cards.title: Sesame launches iOS app for conversational AI
cards.body: The startup from Oculus founders brings conversational AI agents to iOS with natural interactions. The app aims to feel like talking to a person rather than traditional chatbots.

cards.title: Apple redesigns Siri for iOS 27 overhaul
cards.body: New renders reveal Apple's planned AI upgrade including a redesigned Siri experience and standalone app. This positions Apple to compete with ChatGPT and similar platforms.

cards.title: RSI emerges as next frontier beyond AGI
cards.body: New AI labs focus on recursive self-improvement as the next goal. The objective remains elusive despite growing research efforts.

cards.title: Enterprise AI shifts from excitement to safety
cards.body: Companies are no longer evaluating whether AI is exciting but whether it's safe to deploy broadly. This marks a new phase in enterprise AI adoption.

cards.title: Visa invests in Replit for agentic payments
cards.body: Visa backs Replit to power agentic payment workflows for developers. Over 1,000 Visa employees already use Replit for prototyping.

cards.title: General Compute backs SambaNova as next chipmaker
cards.body: The firm bets SambaNova will become the next breakout AI chipmaker. This reflects continued search for alternatives to dominate AI compute.

cards.title: Vertu launches AI foldable for enterprise users
cards.body: The luxury device combines AI-agent workflows with enterprise integrations starting at $6,880. It builds on the open-source Hermes project for AI capabilities.

cards.title: Google's AI struggles with basic spelling
cards.body: Google's AI systems continue to embarrass the company by failing at fundamental tasks. The spelling failures highlight persistent issues in AI reliability.

cards.title: Snowflake secures $6B AWS AI chip deal
cards.body: The five-year contract guarantees Snowflake AI compute chips from Amazon, sidelining Nvidia. This massive deal signals shifting dynamics in AI infrastructure.

cards.title: Remote boosts revenue 50% per employee via AI
cards.body: The payroll startup surpassed $300M ARR and reached cash-flow positivity through AI adoption. Revenue per employee jumped 50% without adding headcount.

cards.title: Google's AI answers reshape SEO strategy entirely
cards.body: AI-generated answers now dominate Google search, leaving brands with minimal visibility into how AI describes them. Years of traditional SEO strategies have become obsolete.

cards.title: Meta rolls out subscription plans with AI features
cards.body: Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp subscriptions launch worldwide with new AI and creator offerings. Meta groups these under its broader 'Meta One' subscription brand.

cards.title: Cognition raises $1B at $25B valuation
cards.body: The AI coding startup more than doubled its valuation in eight months to $25B. Cognition hits $492M in annualized revenue run rate.

cards.title: AI Hype Index shows graduates skeptical of AI
cards.body: College graduates booed former Google CEO Eric Schmidt when he discussed AI's future. The reaction highlights generational skepticism about AI's promised impact.

cards.title: Organizations lack infrastructure for agentic AI
cards.body: 85% of organizations want to be agentic within three years, but 76% say current operations can't support it. A major disconnect exists between ambition and execution.

cards.title: AI job losses remain limited despite hysteria
cards.body: Evidence for AI-driven mass unemployment remains scant despite widespread panic. Aggregate employment in developed countries remains broadly stable.

cards.title: Entry-level work faces AI-driven crisis ahead
cards.body: AI hasn't caused headline job losses yet, but troubling changes hide beneath aggregate employment data. Entry-level positions face particular vulnerability.

cards.title: Anthropic showcases AI coding advancement at event
cards.body: Code with Claude demonstrated the future of AI-assisted development at Anthropic's London developer event. The showcase revealed significant progress in AI coding capabilities.

cards.title: YouTube automatically labels AI-generated videos
cards.body: YouTube begins adding automatic labels to identify AI-created content. This transparency measure helps users distinguish AI-generated from human-created videos.
